hero.label: DAUDA STUDIOS ORIGINAL
hero.title: Dauda: Tiny Body, Big Drama
hero.description: Meet Dauda — professional seed collector, full-time tunnel engineer, and the smallest member of the house with the biggest personality. His daily schedule includes running suspicious distances on the wheel, hiding snacks in places no one remembers, reorganizing his bedding, and pretending he has never been fed before.

details.label: Favourite Things
details.value: Sunflower Seeds • Tunnels • Running • Tiny Naps

hero.footerText: Made exclusively for Dauda • Powered by Seeds & Tiny Chaos 🐹
